name: the hunter's furs
identity: A warm, practical item used by the player character for protection in the cold arctic environment. It is a symbol of comfort and familiarity, representing a connection to the past and a reminder of the world beyond the tribe. It also plays a role in envisioning new dwellings for the tribe and their child.
current_status: Worn by the player character as a source of comfort and warmth during nighttime, serving as a reminder of the past and the world beyond the tribe, and as part of the shared intimacy with the hunter. It is referenced in the context of envisioning new dwellings for the tribe and their child.

description.value: A bundle of furs provided by the village women for warmth and comfort.

appearance.value: Warm, practical furs, likely made from animal pelts, providing insulation against the cold.

purpose.value: Protection against the cold, and as a symbol of comfort and familiarity.

volatile_state.condition: In good condition, well-worn and familiar to the player character.
volatile_state.location: On the player character, used as bedding and clothing.
volatile_state.current_activity: Providing warmth and comfort during the night, serving as a reminder of the past, and being part of the shared intimacy with the hunter. It is referenced in the context of envisioning new dwellings for the tribe and their child.
